name: Climate Data Portals
description: Climate Data Portals is a useful data surface inside Agriculture & Food Systems.
whyUseIt: People in Agriculture & Food Systems use Climate Data Portals to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using Climate Data Portals as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from Climate Data Portals.
